summary: Meta Graph list commands must follow paging.cursors.after when --all is requested, even when generated endpoint metadata omits pagination.
reason: Without the Graph cursor fallback, the published CLI returns only the first 25 records and agents compute totals from incomplete account inventories.
validated_outcome: Regression test aggregates a two-page Graph response; the full Go suite and publish validation pass. Live account verification is pending recovery from Meta API rate limiting.
